title: Is it possible to view individual task deadlines on portfolio calendar?
excerpt: I’m new to using the portfolio features in monday.com and when setting up the calendar view, am only able to see the duration of an entire board in the portfolio with no information about specific deadlines within each b…

posts.author: jdozier-ezell (Jonathan Dozier-Ezell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m new to using the portfolio features in monday.com and when setting up the calendar view, am only able to see the duration of an entire board in the portfolio with no information about specific deadlines within each board. Is it possible to view task dates/durations rather than the full duration of the project? As is, the calendar can tell us what projects are currently open but doesn’t provide any information about what needs to be done for each project on any given day. If a portfolio calendar cannot do this, is there another way to view task dates on a calendar across workspaces?
